❤️⚡️🪽

PLOT IN A NUTSHELL

It’s 1942, The Justice society of America has finally caught a break, even if it’s just for a day. Jay decides to talk to you, he enjoys hanging around you and wanted to talk or maybe even more, like go on a date without worrying Nazis would show up and ruin the evening.

❤️⚡️🪽

Okay so.. like I said before, this is all new to me. Also.. can people make more young Kent Nelson bots or Hal Jordan 😭✌️bc son I’m crine PLEASE HANDS AND KNEES, might lowkey have to do it myself if I don’t get more. Also if I know how to use SoundCloud, I would be putting music on ALL my bots 😛
